title: IdkStuff
description: Inspired by Actions & Stuff, this modpack aims to enhance the game with smooth animations, along with the addition of other cool features! This modpack also improves game performance.
body:
![IdkStuff Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ed604cc3cd8939a007926826b4d91facd0e902e.png) #
Join the Discord server to make suggestions, report bugs, and much more!
### [https://discord.gg/7Hbq7AJ6md](https://discord.gg/7Hbq7AJ6md)

Animated/detail-focused modpack inspired by Actions & Stuff

Want smooth animations and extra 'stuff'? IdkStuff brings player/mob animations, 3D models, shader support, and of small visual tweaks to make your experience feel alive.

Currently Maintained Versions

[](https://modrinth.com/modpack/idkstuff/version/2.2.0+1.21.11) **I'm dropping 1.21.10 support**. Sorry for any inconvenience caused. If you need more time to update to 1.21.11, you can request me to update 1.21.10.

Main Features

- 🐾 Animated player & mob movement - 📦 3D item and block models where supported - ✨ Shader-ready (I recommend using Proton or IterationT) - ⚙️ Performance optimizations - 🔧 Lots of visual & quality of life tweaks - 5 different profiles for different styles! - Default - Default - VFX+ - A&S-like - Trailer - Only animations
Out of all of the Actions & Stuff inspired packs, why use IdkStuff?
I try my best to keep IdkStuff updated to the latest Minecraft version, while others usually lag behind. I also will provide support for 1.21.1 in the future.


Notes & Compatibility

All included mods & resource packs remain under their original authors' licenses. I do not claim ownership.

I aim to support the newest Minecraft version possible. Once a version becomes the second-newest, I will (most likely) stop updating it automatically (I may listen to version requests).

The pack is built on Fabric; most projects are version-specific. Downgrading resource packs/mods may be required for older Minecraft versions.

License & Credits

All rights reserved. Use freely, but please credit me if you share this modpack (videos, mods, etc.). All included mods/resource packs are the property of their respective authors and kept under original licenses.

[](https://vanillatweaks.net/) [](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/creator/oreville-studios)
Actions and Stuff is owned by Orville Studios, and I am not associated or affiliated with them. I have only been inspired by their pack.

Contact/Support

If you find issues or want to suggest features, fill out the form using the "report issues" button linked to this page (issues only), or join the Discord server.


NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT - not associated or affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft.
